description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on every push. Use multiple jobs for different environments: windows-x86, windows-x64, windows-mingw, macos-x64, macos-arm64, linux-x64, linux-arm64, and linux-arm. For each job, check out the repository and use actboy168/setup-luamake to set up luamake. Then, run luamake with various architectures and configurations.
